primary.rationale: Teal differentiates from Linear (purple), Jira (blue), Asana (pink), Notion (B&W). Conveys calm confidence suited for indie dev productivity.

primary-hover.rationale: Darker teal for hover/active states. 1.3:1 ratio with primary for subtle state change.

primary-light.rationale: Very light teal for selected backgrounds, subtle highlights.

background.rationale: Warm near-white. Avoids clinical pure white. Matches Cloud Dancer trend.

surface.rationale: Cards, panels, modals use pure white to lift above background.

sidebar.rationale: Slightly cooler than background for visual separation without hard contrast.

text.rationale: Near-black with slight blue-warmth. Softer than pure #000 but high contrast.

text-secondary.rationale: Slate gray for labels, metadata, secondary information.

text-muted.rationale: Muted slate for placeholder text, disabled states.

border.rationale: Subtle slate border. Visible but not heavy.

border-strong.rationale: Stronger border for focused inputs, important dividers.

error.rationale: Standard semantic red. High urgency, delete actions.

success.rationale: Standard semantic green. Done states, confirmations.

warning.rationale: Amber for caution. Pending reviews, expiring items.

info.rationale: Blue for informational states. Tips, help text.
